## Skill Submission

> **Branch naming:** Your branch must follow `skill/<skill-name>`.
> **One skill per PR.** If you're adding multiple skills, open separate PRs.

---

### Skill details

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Skill name (slug)** | `skill-name` |
| **Category** | qa-testing / pre-deploy-safety / business-sales / engineering-practice / frontend-integration / infra-security / documents / ai-agents / data / comms |
| **Sprint** | Sprint 1 |
| **Product** | zysk / tms / zyniverse |

**What does this skill do?**
<!-- One paragraph. What problem does it solve? Who should use it? -->

**What triggered this build?**
<!-- What manual task or pain point made you build this? -->

---

### Pre-submission checklist

<!-- Check every box before requesting review. CI will also validate these. -->

- [ ] Folder is at `skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`
- [ ] `name` in frontmatter exactly matches the folder name
- [ ] `description` is one sentence, starts with a verb
- [ ] `version` is `1.0.0` (or bumped appropriately if updating)
- [ ] `category` is one of the valid categories from CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] `tags` has 2–5 entries, all lowercase kebab-case
- [ ] `product`, `sprint`, `author`, `email` are filled in
- [ ] Skill has **When to use**, **Steps**, and **Output** sections
- [ ] I have tested this skill with Claude Code or Claude.ai
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)

---

### Test evidence

<!-- How did you verify this skill works? Paste a screenshot description, a prompt/response pair, or link to the SharePoint Sprint Showcase post. -->

---

### Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything the reviewer should know: edge cases, limitations, what's out of scope. -->
